pkgmetadata.longdescription: Cuenca - validations[[test](httpsgithub.comcuenca-mxcuenca-validationsworkflowstestbadge.svg)](httpsgithub.comcuenca-mxcuenca-validationsactionsqueryworkflow3Atest)[[codecov](httpscodecov.ioghcuenca-mxcuenca-validationsbranchmastergraphbadge.svg)](httpscodecov.ioghcuenca-mxcuenca-validations)[[PyPI](httpsimg.shields.iopypivcuenca-validations.svg)](httpspypi.orgprojectcuenca-validations)Shared validations library across multiple Cuenca projects
